channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: We’re entering the era of ‘AI unless proven otherwise’
item.description: On the way to work, you see a TikTok video of the president admitting to a crime. In the elevator, you hear your favorite band, but the song is comple...

item.title: ‘Boy kibble’ is the weird, protein-obsessed TikTok trend you can’t unsee
item.description: Need some recipe inspo for dinners this week? Look no further than the latest viral food trend on TikTok : boy kibble. The gym bro’s answer to girl di...

item.title: Jamie Haller loafers are fashion lore. Can she do the same for sneakers?
item.description: At $600, Jamie Haller loafers aren’t an impulse buy, but they’ve become one of those rare fashion items people evangelize anyway. The shoes, which res...

item.title: KB Home CEO: Homebuilders are slowing spec builds in weaker housing markets
item.description: Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter . One of the clearest messages from...

item.title: Warren Buffett Says 4 Timeless Principles Create Lifelong Success, Fulfillment, and Happiness
item.description: Some of my favorite insights from Warren Buffett.

item.title: This Major OpenAI Rival Is Surging, and There’s a Surprising Reason Why
item.description: A recent report reveals the complex ways that the AI race is unfolding.

item.title: 3 factors that will separate the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ winners from losers
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Chinese platforms like Xiaohongshu look to Southeast Asia as the U.S. applies more scrutiny
item.description: In 2025, China’s trade surplus from digital services jumped to a record high of $33 billion, according to data from the State Administration of Foreig...

item.title: How ‘work from hotel’ became the new WFH
item.description: You might think the most important amenities a hotel could provide would be a comfortable bed and a friendly concierge. For workers looking to shake u...

item.title: The godfather of AI predicts mass unemployment is on its way. This CEO warns even a 10% reduction ‘will feel like a depression’
item.description: Khan Academy CEO Salman Khan predicts the AI revolution will hit the U.S. faster and harder than anyone is anticipating.

item.title: To Make RTO Work, Your Office Has to Feel Less Like Work
item.description: Try these 4 strategies from the hospitality industry to create a workplace environment that can help boost productivity and morale.

item.title: Want to Be a More Ethical Leader? Try This 5-Step Process
item.description: A leading psychologist helps leaders plan ahead for ethical challenges at work.

item.title: What Taco Bell’s New Menu Items Tell Us About Where the Economy Is Headed
item.description: Most fast food chains are struggling, except for Taco Bell. It’s a lesson in how business can navigate a challenging economy.

item.title: Rural America’s $23.6 billion wipeout: the drought that wouldn’t quit
item.description: The Southern Plains have been through it over the last six years—and counting.

item.title: How Trump erased the story of George Washington’s slave, Ona Judge, who fled from Philadelphia to freedom
item.description: In late January, the National Park Service dismantled the slavery exhibit at Philadelphia Independence National Historic Park.

item.title: Schroders shares surge as Nuveen to buy fund manager in $14 bln deal
